meta.unlockRule: Spend 1 Skill Point to unlock any skill within an unlocked tier. Tier 1 is unlocked by default. A tier unlocks once at least 6 of the 10 skills in the previous tier are unlocked.
meta.notes: capstoneBonusXp applies to the 50th (final) skill in each tree, in addition to its tier xp. statLink is a suggested optional integration with an existing Hunter Stat — not required.
